name: PACIFIC HEALTH CARE ORGANIZATION INC
summary: Pacific Health Care Organization, Inc. (PHCO) operates through wholly owned subsidiaries Medex Healthcare, Inc., Medex Managed Care, Inc., and Medex Medical Management, Inc. The company provides workers' compensation-related services, including managed care and medical management solutions. It serves customers seeking cost reduction in workers' compensation claims and related healthcare administration, competing in the workers' compensation managed care industry.
